items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
items.summary: Kuwait says an electricity and water plant is on fire after the second such attack in two days. Iran says US strikes hit an under-construction nuclear power plant.

items.title: Pharaoh’s Daughters Were Skilled at Archery 4,000 Years ago, Reveals New Research
items.summary: For decades, experts have disputed whether weapons found in ancient burial chambers of Egyptian princesses were actually their tools or placed there in a purely symbolic way. Now, a reassessment of fi…
